class.name: MapData
class.brief_description: Selects a province based on its unique color from the province map texture.
class.description: Class responsible for parsing the "definition.csv" file, containing a list of unique RGB as unsigned integer values, province names and a flag character.

method.name: load_csv_data
method.description: Parses the file csv path provided in the csv_path variable, loading it into "province_color_to_name" and "province_color_to_id" dictionaries.

members.member: Path to the csv file that contains the the list of associated RGBs and province name.
Dictionary that takes a color and returns the id of a province.
Dictionary that takes a color and returns the name of a province.
EU4 files from paradox do not have valid data on the first row, set to false if the data used starts with valid data.
